title: The Sea Turns Strange
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the sea turns strange.
scene: The scene focuses on the sea turns strange, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AAAAAAGH!!! Not an even bigger one!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There are two more inside it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm getting something of a...sinking feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can eat that as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You mean the whole crew are killed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The ship appears in a far-away ocean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You mean it's like... a warp zone?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Aaghhh!! What the heck is that fish?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: No!! We've got to cut it loose!!!

summary: The Sea Turns Strange. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
